description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the python:3.8 Docker image and defines three stages: style, test, and doc. Add a global before_script that runs `pip install -r requirements.txt`. In the style stage add three jobs—black, mypy, and ruff—each executing the before_script then respectively `black .`, `mypy --strict serpyco`, and `ruff check .`. In the test stage add a test job that runs on a matrix of Python versions 3.8, 3.9, 3.10, 3.11, and 3.12 using the image `python:${PYTHON_VERSION}`, runs `pip install -e "[dev]"` followed by `pytest`. In the doc stage add a pages job that runs only on tags, executes `pip install -e "[.build-doc]"`, updates apt, installs make, runs `make html`, moves the generated `_build/html/` to a `public` directory, and publishes `public/` as a GitLab Pages artifact.
